PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{LocalAddress=$_.LocalAddress; Pid=$_.OwningProcess; ProcessName=$p.ProcessName; StartTime=$p.StartTime} } } else { Write-Output "Nothing on 5000" })
PowerShell(adb shell "echo -e 'GET /api/health HTTP/1.1\\r\\nHost: localhost\\r\\nConnection: close\\r\\n\\r\\n' | nc localhost 5000")
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime })
PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 1300 | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime, @{Name='Args';Expression={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=1300"\).CommandLine}})

PowerShell(Get-NetFirewallPortFilter | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq 5000 } | ForEach-Object { $rule = Get-NetFirewallRule -AssociatedNetFirewallPortFilter $_; [PSCustomObject]@{DisplayName=$rule.DisplayName; Direction=$rule.Direction; Action=$rule.Action; Enabled=$rule.Enabled} }; Write-Output "---"; Get-NetFirewallProfile | Select-Object Name, Enabled, DefaultInboundAction)

PowerShell(Write-Output "--- svchost.exe PID 4536 hosts these services ---"; Get-CimInstance Win32_Service -Filter "ProcessId=4536" | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, State | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "--- Reserved/excluded port ranges \(HNS hidden reservations\) ---"; netsh int ipv4 show excludedportrange protocol=tcp | Select-String "5000|--|Protocol|range" | Select-Object -First 30; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "--- Test from laptop: localhost vs LAN IP ---"; try { Write-Output "localhost: $\(\(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 -Uri http://localhost:5000/api/health\).Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "localhost: FAIL - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { Write-Output "LAN-IP:    $\(\(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 -Uri http://192.168.100.12:5000/api/health\).Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "LAN-IP:    FAIL - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "---"; Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-NetFirewallRule -Direction Inbound -Enabled True -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \(Get-NetFirewallPortFilter -AssociatedNetFirewallRule $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).LocalPort -eq 5000 } | Select-Object DisplayName, Action, Profile, Enabled | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object Status -eq 'Up' | Select-Object Name, InterfaceDescription, Status, LinkSpeed | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "---VPN check---"; Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceDescription -match 'VPN|TAP|WAN Miniport|Wintun|OpenVPN|Tailscale|Wireguard' -and $_.Status -eq 'Up' } | Select-Object Name, InterfaceDescription, Status | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($svc = Get-CimInstance Win32_Service | Where-Object { $_.ProcessId -eq 4536 }; $svc | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, State, StartMode, PathName | Format-List; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "Process info:"; Get-Process -Id 4536 | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path, StartTime | Format-List)

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -Wait -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-Command','netsh interface portproxy delete v4tov4 listenaddress=0.0.0.0 listenport=5000; netsh interface portproxy show all | Out-File -Encoding utf8 C:\\Users\\Public\\portproxy-after.txt'; Get-Content C:\\Users\\Public\\portproxy-after.txt; Remove-Item C:\\Users\\Public\\portproxy-after.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Port 8000 \(ai-service\) ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Test ai-service health ==="; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/health' -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { "ai-service NOT reachable: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== express-ws version ==="; \(Get-Content "d:\\TrueTilawah\\backend\\package.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).dependencies | Select-Object -Property express, 'express-ws', ws | Format-List; Write-Output "=== Installed express-ws ==="; if \(Test-Path "d:\\TrueTilawah\\backend\\node_modules\\express-ws\\package.json"\) { \(Get-Content "d:\\TrueTilawah\\backend\\node_modules\\express-ws\\package.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\) | Select-Object name, version } else { "express-ws not installed" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Both Node processes ==="; Get-Process -Id 21580, 17716 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{N='CmdLine';E={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine}} | Format-List; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== ALL node.exe processes ==="; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 21580 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Write-Output "=== Port 5000 listeners after kill ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Health check on LAN IP ==="; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://192.168.100.12:5000/api/health' -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Active Node servers ==="; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'server\\.js' -and $_.CommandLine -notmatch 'nodemon' } | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List; Write-Output "=== Port 5000 listener ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Inbound firewall rules touching port 5000 ==="; $rules = Get-NetFirewallRule -Direction Inbound -Enabled True -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $rules | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-NetFirewallPortFilter -AssociatedNetFirewallRule $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p.LocalPort -eq 5000\) { [pscustomobject]@{ Name=$_.DisplayName; Action=$_.Action; Profile=$_.Profile; Protocol=$p.Protocol } } } | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Active block rules for any port on inbound ==="; Get-NetFirewallRule -Direction Inbound -Enabled True -Action Block -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object DisplayName, Profile -First 5 | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Port 5000 ==="; $l = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($l\) { $l | Select-Object LocalAddress, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { "\(FREE — ready for npm run start\)" }; Write-Output "=== Any node servers right now? ==="; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'server\\.js' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Python ai-service health ==="; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/health' -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { "NOT REACHABLE: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Python process\(es\) listening on :8000 ==="; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='python.exe' OR Name='python3.exe' OR Name='py.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'uvicorn|app\\.main' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List)
